# password : String

«class»
Doctor

- clinicSystem : ClinicSystem
- hourlyRate : double
- affiliation : String
- educationalBackground : String
- specialty : Specialty «enum»
- status : DoctorStatus «enum»
- registrationDocuments : ArrayList<DoctorDocument>
- availableSlots : ArrayList<TimeSlot>
- patients : ArrayList<Patient>
- contractAccepted : boolean
- sessionprice : double

+ register(username:String, name:String, email:String, password:String, dob:LocalDate, hourlyRate:double, affiliation:String, education:String, specialty:Specialty) : void

+ uploadRegistrationDocs(docs: ArrayList<DoctorDocument>) : void

+ updateProfile(email:String, rate:double, affiliation:String) : void

+ acceptContract() : void

+ viewHealthRecords(patient:Patient) : void

+ deleteMedicine(p:Prescription, medicineId:String) : void

«class»
Appointment

- documentId : String - fileType : String - uploadDate : LocalDate

«class»
Prescription
- prescriptionId : String - doctor : Doctor - patient : Patient - medicines : ArrayList<Medicine> - submitted : boolean

Medicine

«class»
HealthRecord
- recordId : String - patient : Patient - doctor : Doctor - description : String - date : LocalDate

Singleton
%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22text%3Bhtml%3D1%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dcenter%3BfontStyle%3D2%3BfontSize%3D10%3BfontColor%3D%237B00D4%3B%22%20value%3D%22%C2%ABSingleton%C2%BB%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2220%22%20width%3D%22220%22%20x%3D%22130%22%20y%3D%221880%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3EClinicSystem

- users : ArrayList<User> - healthPackages : ArrayList<HealthPackage> - appointments : ArrayList<Appointment> - wallets: ArrayList<Wallet> - doctorDocuments: ArrayList<DoctorDocuments> - patientDocuments: ArrayList<MedicalDocuments>

«Facade»
ClinicFacade
- clinicSystem : ClinicSystem - paymentContext : PaymentContext - apptSubject : AppointmentSubject

+ cancelAppointment(a:Appointment) : void

+ registerDoctor(data:DoctorData) : Doctor

+ filterDoctors(specialty:Specialty, date:LocalDate) : ArrayList<Doctor>
